title: wAnounce
description: This is a simple on-screen announcment plugin with customisable and lots more !
body:
# Welcome to wAnnounce

This is a simple plugin which allows on-screen announcments and is VERY EASY to setup. It also has folia support and has been tested to work in all versions from 1.21-1.21.11

We offer support in our discord.

## Commands:
- /announce [announcments\msg]
- /announcereload [reload config]
